Generate sites with weighted patient distribution

generate_sites.Rd

Generate sites with weighted patient distribution

Usage

generate_sites(
  raw_site_df,
  sampled_subj,
  new_study_id,
  target_site_count,
  vSiteIDs
)

Arguments

raw_site_df

Raw site data frame

sampled_subj

Data frame of sampled subjects

new_study_id

New study ID string

target_site_count

Target number of sites to generate

vSiteIDs

Site ID column names in hierarchical order

Value

List with generated_sites and updated_sampled_subj

On this page

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
